reviews.title: Surprise!!!!!!
reviews.text: Surprise charge for parking

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Check in time was 4pm and over the phone we were told after 3pm check in will be okay with no fee. 
However, at 4pm rooms still not ready. 
We got our keys at 4:35pm. We were there from 3: 15pm. I felt that Hampton guests were not given priority.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Hotel was nice. The breakfast could be better. The rooms were nice, the housekeeping could do better. There were a few Cheerios on the floor by bed when we got into our room. I don’t think they vacuum the floors cause they were all weekend 😩 To say that I would stay there again.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: You need to check your records either you guys or the Hotel, did not have our dates they would not let us stay at the hotel. You guys refunded me.

reviews.title: Clean and comfortable
reviews.text: Nice large hotel. They do charge 13.00 per night to park which seems piggy. Otherwise a-ok.

reviews.title: Beware of unauthorized parking fees
reviews.positives: We have been staying here 3 times a year for 8 years, beware they will charge you parking fees without notification or authorization,  and the Manager is EXTREMELY RUDE
reviews.negatives: Charging me and several others and oversized parking fees without notification,  they did not inform us, didn't bother to give us the opportunity to move our trailer. We attended a car show three times per year, have always stayed there and have never experienced this. The Manager refused to remove the charge and WAS EXTREMELY RUDE ON THE PHONE. The obviously do not appreciate repeat and long term customers.  They could have simply called the room, my cell phone or left a message and we would have along with many other car show attendees moved our trailers. Not sure if I am comfortable returning to this location.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
We arrived at the airport in the evening so it was very convenient and the
free airport shuttle was a plus. Staff was very professional and the rooms were very clean.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The room was nice
reviews.negatives: They did not allow us to check in until more than an hour after the original check in time, but still charged me the same amount. On top of that they did allow a later check out, but it was only 30 mins later, even though they made me wait more than an hour for the check in time.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Good value for money!

reviews.title: I didn’t like the fact that the sheets had stains on them, also I woke up with an allergic reaction the next morning all
reviews.positives: I liked the parking being very spacious.
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like the fact that the sheets had stains on them, also I woke up with an allergic reaction the next morning all over my body. I had to go to the doctor and they ended up telling me it was bed bugs.

reviews.title: okay to stay!
reviews.text: It's a nice place. Nothing that fancy. Many options for coffee at the welcome desk.
reviews.room_type: Two Queen Beds room with Courtyard View

reviews.title: Very dissatisfied with lack of transparency regarding parking and the fact that there was no one on site to address my c
reviews.positives: Plenty of parking.
reviews.negatives: They charge you for parking.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Employees were helpful, knowledgeable and friendly.

reviews.title: Great friendly staff......lousy room.
reviews.positives: All staff were great!
reviews.negatives:
A/C did not work properly.
Blackout shades did not cover entire window.
Road noise was offensive.
But the bed was the worst!  First I thought it was just me but then my wife (105 lbs) said the same thing. By end of our stay both of us had severe back pain.  
When it cannot even support a thin lightweight women you can image how I (200) was unhappy.

reviews.title: Convenient shuttle to LGB Airport
reviews.text: We stayed here for 1 night because we needed a hotel with a shuttle that could get us to the airport @ 5:30 a.m. because we had an early flight. It worked out very well, and they even gave us To-Go breakfast bags because we coudn't stay for their breakfast buffet. There's plenty of restaurants close by (In-N-Out and Jersey Mike's are 2 fast-food offerings.) Good job, Hampton Inn!

reviews.title: Whatever happy mood you have during the day, this hotel will ruin it once you enter your room.
reviews.positives: Location but that’s because of city of Long Beach not the hotel itself.
reviews.negatives: Don’t get fooled by the photo posted by the hotel. They might make you think it is a new hotel with clean and modern design. It is not! It’s a very bad maintained hotel. The door of bathroom won’t stay closed. AC is old , loud and dirty. There is even a big crack on the sink of bathroom. The cleanliness of room is also disappointing. Sofa, armchair, carpet, even bed sheet and bath towel has some mystery stain on them! The bath towel are hard as rock also, they probably should replace them long time ago. Breakfast is way below average of Hampton Inn standard.

reviews.title: Satisfying Overnight Stay
reviews.text: Location, breakfast, room size, facilities, free airport shuttle are great for this property.

reviews.title: Very high price to pay for a hotel that is out of date and fails to provide quality rooms.
reviews.positives: The parking and lobby were very nice. Lovely lobby and lounge area for a nice first impression.
reviews.negatives: Bathrooms were mediocre at best. Very low toilet. Old plastic form shower. No hand towels just bath and facecloths. No lotion amenities and no glass. No free bottled water. Very noisy rooms. Heard upstairs guest through poor quality ceiling. Heard outdoor noise through windows and I was on third floor. Window coverings impractical and hard to operate. Ugly.

reviews.title: Nice place
reviews.text: Stayed here 1 night before picking up a rental car at long beach airport. We loved the pool, the free breakfast and our room. We would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: meh
reviews.positives: Place was clean
reviews.negatives: Breakfast not starting until 7:00 a.m. was major inconvenience. Terrible noise like a jet engine warming up on 5th floor all day and all night - think it was the heat pump/air con for the entire building on the roof or something. Barn door on bathroom was stupid - huge, heavy and couldn't keep it from banging open and closed all the time. Pool was closed - being resurfaced or something. Only one elevator was working for entire building.

reviews.title: Pleasant and attractive
reviews.text: Very pleasant hello at the front desk and the interior is attractive. Mattress was great and the pillow was exceptional. Breakfast was okay, it sufficed. Hot tub and pool are fabulous, clean and enjoyable. I recommend this place.
reviews.room_type: king room w/ sofa bed and courtyard view

reviews.title: Horrible night
reviews.positives: The hotel was nice and clean. The staff was friendly.
reviews.negatives: The room felt small and cramped. The bed was horrible!! I did not sleep well at all!! They should have spent more on quality mattresses. I do not recommend.

reviews.title: Great stay and staff
reviews.text: Just an overnight stay but the staff was exceptional and the room was very comfortable. Close to the airport!

reviews.title: I booked a king bed only to be given a queen room. A very noisy room facing the street until I changed the next day to t
reviews.positives: Close to restaurants & shops
reviews.negatives: Very noisy rooms if facing the front of the property

reviews.title: Great hotel.
reviews.text: Solid. Staff are great and facilities are top notch for the price and location.

reviews.title: We will NOT be staying here again.
reviews.positives: The bed was comfortable. The room was clean. The breakfast that was included in the price was good.
reviews.negatives:
The parking was terrible and we were not told there was a parking charge even though we had to park in the street. There was 2 bottles of water in the room for $8 each-the hotel tried to charge us for one even though we didn't drink or take any.
What is a TOURISM FEE and RM CITY FEE??? We live in the same state where the hotel was located in California. I called and spoke to a representative and the manager which both were rude to us on the phone....

reviews.title: Great location!!
reviews.text: This hotel was beautiful and clean and the breakfast was wonderful. I would definitely stay again.

reviews.title: Dirty, noisy, no soap, closed hot tub
reviews.positives: good pillows, comfy bed
reviews.negatives:
Dirty room: a read smear on the light switch, something I had to wipe off the bathroom wall, floor didn't look like it was vacuumed. 
The hotel had NO soap for the bathroom sink. Never mentioned it when we checked in.  Later, they said to use the shower gel for soap.  A little inconvenient after using the toilet.  The front desk gave us free parking for these problems.
Hot tub had caution tape around it the 3.5 days we were there so couldn't use it.  
There was a knocking sound throughout our stay.  Sometimes woke us up in the morning.  Perhaps water pipes in the wall?
Traffic noise woke us up frequently.  (Windows were closed)
Dirty breakfast tables not wiped down in between users.  Kinda gross.  
Perhaps this is Hampton Inn policy, but plastic cups for juice and disposable plates and bowls?  Not too environmentally friendly

reviews.title: The Best
reviews.text: So Beautiful, so many upscale amenities, employees so friendly and helpful. The bed, so comfortable, the bedding so cozy and soft. Nice convenient location with plenty of shops around including whole foods

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: room
reviews.negatives: breakfast, parking fee

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very nice hotel. Staff was very courteous and free breakfast was good quality. I would definitely stay again.

reviews.title: I won’t be staying here again
reviews.positives: The pool area and out door seating was nice
reviews.negatives: The staff was not understanding although initially upon check in the front clerk was nice. But that changed. She told us that we’d be staying in a room with a pull out couch and that was a lie. The breakfast was cold and over cooked. The staff accused the kids of being noisey the first and harassed them at three times. It turned out to be coming from about her room. I was disappointed by the rudeness of the night staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Beautiful rooms clean and friendly staff.  Breakfast was good. The pool was warm. Quiet.

reviews.title: Wouldnt stay here again
reviews.positives: The breakfast and location were decent
reviews.negatives: Very Small room, I wasn't given the room I reserved, it was way too expensive plus had to pay for parking...

reviews.title: Close to Long Beach Airport - Great Value
reviews.text:
This is the second time I stayed here overnight due to a very early flight the next day. Free parking, free airport shuttle - not to mention it's only less than 5 min away from the airport. The nightly rate included breakfast and if you have to leave before kitchen opens, they'd pack you a bagel and bottle of water to go. 

The room is very clean and the bed/pillows are very comfortable! Would stay there again.
reviews.room_type: Two Queen Beds room with Courtyard View

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Good each day. Walk in shower

reviews.title: The service
reviews.text:
I love the service that the hotel provided 
On time and fast

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Convince to Long Beach airport
reviews.negatives:
Disturbances early in the morning people out side yelling 
Food wasn’t tasty and selection very minimal

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text: This was a last minute booking due to a flight delay, and we were most pleasantly surprised by how nice it is. Very clean, well-appointed, spacious - even the fitness center had plenty of excellent equipment. The staff was very friendly and helpful also. We would gladly return.

reviews.title: Overcharge
reviews.positives: The hotel was clean
reviews.negatives: They charge guest $10 for internet use which is ridiculous

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Great choice for a quick stop in Long Beach.
Very comfortable bed!!!  And very clean!!’

reviews.title: comfortable room, uncomfortably scented lobby atmosphere
reviews.positives: Location is great, close to the airport
reviews.negatives:
No mention of a fee for parking until I saw the charge on my credit card. It's not that they charge for overnight parking, it's that they didn't mention it when they handed out the parking tag.
The lobby was HEAVILY scented, sinus-impacting scented. Way too much

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We recently spent 2 nights at Hampton Inn Long Beach Airport and had a great experience!   The room was extremely clean, the breakfast was a nice surprise and the staff was friendly and accommodating!  Will stay there again!
reviews.room_type: Two Queen Beds room with Courtyard View

reviews.title: It was comfortable and uncomfortable.
reviews.positives: Very nice
reviews.negatives: Manager Adrian asked me to pay the room again after I paid online through Booking.com, and I did even before I received a confirmation email that my payment was received. I didn’t cancel my booking I just changed the date and was approved by Booking.com. Hampton Inn Long Beach should sort this out with Booking.com instead of double charging me.

reviews.title: REVIEW
reviews.text: great hotel,great location near resturants,shopping
reviews.room_type: Two Queen Beds room with Courtyard View

reviews.title: Expected more
reviews.positives: Breakfast buffet
reviews.negatives: Busy road, small room, paid parking

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Charges $12 for parking nightly
Breakfast is good except if you showed up half a hour before the  end time, there is  not much left.  They don’t restock/replenish the items.

reviews.title: The dog smells are what got me?
reviews.positives: Arrived early and was told that they had no reservations for me because sometimes they don’t enter third party reservations. They put me in an asked for $50 early check but wasn’t able to check in until about 3:30 of course I asked for my $50 to be refunded back to me. Did not receive the room that I had booked, but was asked would we take a double room we did cause we were tired of waiting .Haven’t received a bill yet. Personally I really don’t like staying where animals are staying after we left went home We both were sick. I could smell the dogs all up and down the elevator and the sitting area. Yes the hotel look nice but the smell is the issue with me.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: very nice hotel. complimentary coffee and teas. and even breakfast was outstanding. the staff here is very helpful, attentive, and friendly. i’d highly recommend this hotel and i’m definitely staying here again.

reviews.title: For the rest
reviews.positives: The pool and jaccuzzi
reviews.negatives: I had to wait and check in @ 4:30 my flight arrived around 3pm idk what the cleaning staff was doing all that time

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Great place to stay.

reviews.title: We were 4 elderly ladies and had no help with luggage. Hotel was nice free shuttle
reviews.positives: Food was ok. Room was nice. No one to help 4 elderly ladies with luggage. We had a very hard time.  I paid 50.00 I was told I had to pay and never got it back.
reviews.negatives: No one to help with luggage.

reviews.title: Best place for our needs
reviews.text: This hotel was new and had all the amenities that we would expect at a business hotel. It was 1 mile from the airport and had plenty of stores and dining options in walking distance

reviews.title: I wouldn`t be back
reviews.positives:
We were underneath a room where someone was stomping up & down most of the night. But worse were the people next door where a man was constantly shouting/arguing. The door was slammed several times & the heavy bathroom door many times too. I called the front desk twice & still it continued.
The Wi Fi signal was not good either.
reviews.negatives: As above

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 침구류 컨디션이 좋았음

reviews.title: Nice hotel but some amenities are substandard.
reviews.positives: Sizeable room.  Convenient
reviews.negatives:
Bed linens were not pressed giving the impression that the bed had been slept in.  Bath towel had a hole.
Paper cups in the room are not acceptable considering the price.

reviews.title: 舒適與方便的住宿選擇
reviews.text: 位置佳, 乾淨

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Very clean and very nice rooms.
reviews.negatives: House keeping knocked on our door at 930 and woke us up to see if we were still there, they knocked probably about 10 times before I answered. Then being woke like that me and my wife freaked out and got ready real quick and  went and checked out, then realized check out was at 11, what they did was not nice or professional

reviews.title: 舒適與便利的選擇
reviews.text: 位置極佳, 附近就有超市與餐廳, 離 LGB 機場非常近, 非常適合出差住宿

reviews.title: The stay was okay accept the check in process.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was not bad, most of the staff excellent attitude.
reviews.negatives: The female staff member that checked us in was rude and talked down to us. Her statement of "are you sure you're not at the right hotel" and attitude when I mentioned we are traveling with our pet and it not being on the info provided by the 3rd party we purchased our stay with was just plain mean.

reviews.title: 讚
reviews.text: 讚

reviews.title: For the price more things should be offered.
reviews.positives: Clean and modern hotel.  Easy check-in.  Friendly staff.  Great location near downtown and harbor.  Near shops and restaurants.  There are multiple activities for guests like cornhole and chess.
reviews.negatives: We were given 2 queen beds instead of a king.  One of the lamp shades was broken laying on the desktop.  Beds were too firm and made our backs sore.  There was no shampoo or conditioner in shower for guests.  No laundry bag.  Bottled water was $8 each!  Too expensive.  Should have been complimentary.  The breakfast was limited.  No scrambled eggs or bacon.  Only two cereals offered and waffles you have to make yourself.  For the price you should have more choices and have a chef cook.

reviews.title: Won’t stay again
reviews.positives: Close to family and the airport
reviews.negatives: We were there 3 nights and the room was never cleaned, when I spoke to the desk they indicated they only checked rooms every other day, they never checked ours. We had to ask for coffee every night and never received fresh towels. There were cockroaches around the hot tub.

reviews.title: Bed was very uncomfortable
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Bed

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
The over it was clean
And I paid alot of money
reviews.negatives: Bedding was very wrinkled and discolored. Pillows were flat

reviews.title: Eh. It was ok.
reviews.positives: Pillows were comfortable. Room was clean. Shower was good..... Toilet paper?........
reviews.negatives: ..... Toilet paper was 1 ply. Bed had just one thin blanket.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Great location from the Airport.
reviews.negatives: I saw bugs crawling around on the wall in our room

reviews.title: Just ok.
reviews.positives: spacious room
reviews.negatives: Layout of room. TV on the side opposite bed. Not enough washcloths, very low seating toilet.

reviews.title: Acceptable with reservations
reviews.positives: Was fine, but not as good as your other properties.
reviews.negatives: Have never paid for handicap parking in my life.

reviews.title: Good location close to Long Beach, Airport, friendly staff, always clean.
reviews.positives: It's located close to Long Beach Airport. It's always clean and the staff is friendly.
reviews.negatives: The bed in our room was lumpy and uncomfortable. The blackout shade did not go all the way down. The alarm clocks are so bright you have to put them under the bed. This was a problem because we were on the busiest side with traffic roaring by all night long.

reviews.title: Not the best nor the worst
reviews.positives: Staff was very accommodating and helpful with early check-in. The lobby is really nice, big and open. The rooms were big with lots of space. TV easily connected to favorite streaming accounts.
reviews.negatives: In general there was a musty odor in both rooms. One room however smelled like a high school gym. Very strange, and seemed to be coming from the bed and a specific pillow. The thermostat also didn't seem to be working in the room, and the actual heating and cooling unit rattled very loudly when it did turn on with buttons on it. The other room did not have buttons on the unit. And seemed more updated.

reviews.title: Overall good experience
reviews.positives: Clean and seems new
reviews.negatives: There is a ton of parking however you have to pay for parking

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Breakfast is good, and server is friendly.
reviews.negatives: $16 parking fee per night.  Other hotel in the the same area does not collect parking fee.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The bed is good
reviews.negatives: the price is on the high side

reviews.title: Conveniently close to the cruise port
reviews.positives: The customer service was very good. Everyone was very nice and greeted us when they saw us. The breakfast was good but it could of been better. The room was a nice size and clean.
reviews.negatives: I requested a handicap room and it didn't feel like one. The bench above the tube is actually very dangerous and not connected to the wall properly. When the bench extends from the wall it comes down as at a slant. When it gets wet it was very easy to slide off bench onto the floor. Luckily I was able to grab onto the bar before that happened. Please check on this. I would hate to see anyone hurt.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Clean and conveniently located.
reviews.negatives: The $75 incidentals as well as the $20 per day for parking.   I felt the incidentals was a little too high and I’m not sure why Hampton Inn charges for parking for its own customers when we already paid for the room.

reviews.title: I had a nice stay.
reviews.positives: I did not enjoy the breakfasts.
reviews.negatives: Selection.  Need more fruit

reviews.title: Unhappy with false information about having an airport shuttle.
reviews.positives: You advertised a shuttle from the airport to the hotel, but I found out the shuttle was broken down and I had to pay for cab rides. That alone left a bad taste in my mouth for this hotel.
reviews.negatives: The staff was very helpful and pleasant and apologized for paying for the cab out of pocket, especially since there were four people and seven suitcases, so I had to pay for a total of four cabs.

reviews.title: Great location but customer service improvements needed
reviews.positives: Cleanliness and walkability to restaurants.
reviews.negatives: Customer service can be improved. Desk staff didn’t take the time to listen to the customer to adequately address the question. Left me as a customer feeling dismissed and waved off.

reviews.title: I would have been completely happy if I could have slept.
reviews.positives: Quiet room. Nice, calming decor. Staff at checkout and breakfast outstanding. Location near an interesting aviation historical park.  Eateries within walking distances. Parking lot  well lit and very adequate with sufficient parking.
reviews.negatives: When I travel, I stay in a hotel so that I have a comfortable place to sleep.  Sleep is important to me.  But, the bed was uncomfortable, too hard.  I had restless sleep and woke up tired and achy.  If you don't provide a comfortable bed, you can't succeed at your mission.

reviews.title: Thank you for the opportunity to provide some details.
reviews.positives: Location suited my needs.  The staff was responsive to my request for a replacement desk chair.  The bathroom was clean and properly stocked.   The morning of my departure I witnessed a staff member doing a very thorough job of cleaning up trash in the parking area.
reviews.negatives: The carpeting in the stair tower on the eastside of the building was dirty.  The desk chair in my room was filthy dirty and stained with unknown substances.  There was small trash and debris that housekeeping had missed under the desk area.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Installations outside are nice, parking was ok, good for families
reviews.negatives: Breakfast closes early, and there’s no water available outside—only coffee. Other Hampton Inns usually have flavored water for guests.

reviews.title: Hotel and staff are great but avoid the first floor rooms.
reviews.positives: Staff was friendly and helpful. We had an issue getting into our room initially and they fixed it. And they promptly replaced a missing TV remote control.
reviews.negatives: We had a first floor room facing the pool area. Since the lounge seats were outside our window, there was no privacy unless we closed the blackout blinds 24/7. Guests were out there regularly, enjoying the L.A. weather, and outdoor music can be heard until 10pm at night. We can also clearly hear the outside guests' conversations.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Everything was nice and neat in there great pool and hot tub and amenities.
reviews.negatives: Didn't get the best room service, missed some days we were scheduled for and ran out of a few things.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: N/a
reviews.negatives: N/a
